overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long VALE Daily ETF (VALG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Vale S.A. (NYSE: VALE) stock, less fees, and expenses VALG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
